# BP-15 negative: helper call does not recurse on the same sync.Once
lang: go
file: BP-15-indirect-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

// Init runs setup through a different sync.Once instance.
func Init() {
	var once sync.Once
	var other sync.Once
	once.Do(func() {
		setup(&other)
	})
}

func setup(other *sync.Once) {
	other.Do(func() {})
}
